translations.text: Woe to those who give short measure,

text_qpc_hafs: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكۡتَالُواْ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسۡتَوۡفُونَ ٢
text_uthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ

translations.text: who demand of other people full measure for themselves,
but give less than they should when it is they who weigh or measure for others!
Do these people not realize that they will be raised up
on a mighty Day,
a Day when everyone will stand before the Lord of the Worlds?

text_qpc_hafs: كـَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلۡفُجَّارِ لَفِي سِجِّينٖ ٧
text_uthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ

translations.text: No indeed! The list of the wicked is in Sijjin––
what will explain to you what Sijjin is?––
a clearly numbered list.
Woe on that day to the deniers,
those who deny the Day of Judgement!

text_qpc_hafs: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعۡتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ ١٢
text_uthmani: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ

translations.text: Only the evil aggressor denies it:

text_qpc_hafs: إِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ ١٣
text_uthmani: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

translations.text: when Our revelations are recited to him, he says, ‘Ancient fables!’

text_qpc_hafs: كـَلَّاۖ بَلۡۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ ١٤
text_uthmani: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ

translations.text: No indeed! Their hearts are encrusted with what they have done.

text_qpc_hafs: كـَلَّآ إِنَّهُمۡ عَن رَّبِّهِمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لَّمَحۡجُوبُونَ ١٥
text_uthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ

translations.text: No indeed! On that Day they will be screened off from their Lord,
they will burn in Hell,

text_qpc_hafs: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ ١٧
text_uthmani: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ

translations.text: and they will be told, ‘This is what you called a lie.’

text_qpc_hafs: كـَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارِ لَفِي عِلِّيِّينَ ١٨
text_uthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ

translations.text: No indeed! The list of the truly good is in 'Illiyyin––
what will explain to you what 'Illiyyin is?––
a clearly written list,
witnessed by those brought near.
The truly good will live in bliss,
seated on couches, gazing around.
You will recognize on their faces the radiance of bliss.

translation.text: They will be given to drink

translations.text: They will be served a sealed nectar,

text_qpc_hafs: خِتَٰمُهُۥ مِسۡكٞۚ وَفِي ذَٰلِكَ فَلۡيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلۡمُتَنَٰفِسُونَ ٢٦
text_uthmani: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ

translations.text: its seal [perfumed with] a fragrant herb––let those who strive, strive for this––
mixed with the water of Tasnim,
a spring from which those brought near will drink.

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجۡرَمُواْ كَانُواْ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ يَضۡحَكُونَ ٢٩
text_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ

translations.text: The wicked used to laugh at the believers––
they would wink at one another when the believers passed by them,

text_qpc_hafs: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓاْ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُواْ فَكِهِينَ ٣١
text_uthmani: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ

translations.text: joke about them when they got back to their own people,

text_qpc_hafs: وَإِذَا رَأَوۡهُمۡ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ ٣٢
text_uthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ

translations.text: and say, when they saw them, ‘These people are misguided,’
though they were not sent to be their keepers-

text_qpc_hafs: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡكُفَّارِ يَضۡحَكُونَ ٣٤
text_uthmani: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ

translations.text: so today the believers are laughing at the disbelievers
as they sit on couches, gazing around.

text_qpc_hafs: هَلۡ ثُوِّبَ ٱلۡكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُواْ يَفۡعَلُونَ ٣٦
text_uthmani: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ

translations.text: Have the disbelievers [not] been repaid for their deeds?
